questions.q: Which data analytics company reported an 85% revenue growth in its Q1 2026 earnings, marking its fastest expansion since its 2020 market debut?
Which satellite internet provider slashed the monthly price of its US Residential plan to $29 for the first three months, according to a May 5, 2026 announcement?
In May 2026, which Middle Eastern nation reported coming under Iranian attack for the first time since an April ceasefire, as the U.S. moved to reopen the Strait of Hormuz?
According to CEO Jensen Huang in May 2026, his tech company's market share in China dropped to "zero percent" due to US export policies. Which company does he lead?
In May 2026, the group 'Stay Free Alberta' delivered a petition to Elections Alberta with over 300,000 signatures calling for what?
options: The removal of the carbon tax
A ban on wind and solar farms
The recall of Premier Danielle Smith

questions.q: On May 4, 2026, the Supreme Court restored nationwide access to which abortion pill through telehealth, mail, and pharmacies?
Two U.S. Navy destroyers transited the Strait of Hormuz in May 2026 after dodging a sustained barrage of missiles, drones, and small boats from which country?
A May 2026 Northwestern University study on paternal mortality data in Georgia found that the majority of deaths among new dads within five years of birth were due to what?
options: Potentially preventable causes like homicide and accidental injury
Genetic heart conditions triggered by stress
Workplace accidents due to sleep deprivation
questions.correctText: Potentially preventable causes like homicide and accidental injury

questions.q: Which provincial political leader made headlines in May 2026 for predicting that Premier Doug Ford would eventually go to prison?
In May 2026, the federal government announced a new program to begin tracking which specific group of people once their permits expire?
